# Citation Agent

Pay-per-citation research with Circle Gateway on Arc Testnet, plus USDC-staked on-chain trust attestations.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/
Landing page.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/marketplace
x402 marketplace demo, citation catalog, and public on-chain claims registry.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/dashboard
Settlement dashboard: payments, creator royalties, agent reputation, withdrawals, and Claims tab.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/dashboard?tab=attestations
Public registry of USDC-staked attestations grouped by target (X accounts, wallets, sites, agents).

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/premium/citation/index
Free citation catalog for research agents.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/attestation/claims
JSON index of attestation targets and total USDC staked per target.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/marketplace/hello
Paid hello-world x402 endpoint ($0.01).
